IS_EMAIL: {property} must be a valid email address
IS_PHONE_NUMBER: {property} must be a valid phone number
IS_ENUM: {property} must be a valid enum value
IS_DATE_STRING: {property} must be a valid date string
ARRAY_MAX_SIZE: {property} must not contain more than {constraints.0} items
MATCHES_PASSWORD: Password must contain at least 1 letter and 1 number
IS_IN: {property} must be one of the allowed values
IS_NOT_IN: {property} must not be one of the forbidden values
IS_ALPHANUMERIC: {property} must contain only letters and numbers
IS_HEX_COLOR: {property} must be a valid hex color
IS_IP: {property} must be a valid IP address
IS_PORT: {property} must be a valid port number
IS_MAC_ADDRESS: {property} must be a valid MAC address
IS_MONGO_ID: {property} must be a valid MongoDB ObjectId
IS_CREDIT_CARD: {property} must be a valid credit card number
IS_CURRENCY: {property} must be a valid currency format
IS_DATA_URI: {property} must be a valid data URI
IS_FIREBASE_PUSH_ID: {property} must be a valid Firebase push ID
IS_IDENTITY_CARD: {property} must be a valid identity card number
IS_ISO8601: {property} must be a valid ISO8601 date
IS_LATLONG: {property} must be a valid latitude-longitude coordinate
IS_MIME_TYPE: {property} must be a valid MIME type
IS_MOBILE_PHONE: {property} must be a valid mobile phone number
IS_RFC_3339: {property} must be a valid RFC 3339 date
IS_SEMANTIC_VERSION: {property} must be a valid semantic version
AT_LEAST_ONE: At least one field is required: {constraints}
